International Business Machines Corporation???S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against Maritz Global Events At&L Inc. And Moes 1 To 25, Inclusive
Off Calendar Apr-14-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOEL H. SIEGAL, Esq. of Siegal & Richardson, LLP (Tel: 510-271-6720) for plaintiff Deborah Freeman;
Atty. M. KATHLEEN GALLAGHER, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani LLP (Tel: 415-986-5900) for cross-defendant International Business Machines Corp.

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MACHINES CORPORATION's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against Maritz Global Events AT&L Inc. and Moes 1 To 25, Inclusive.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

IBM's motion for leave to file an indemnity and contribution cross-complaint against Maritz Global Events and "Moes 1 to 25" is denied. As IBM concedes, the cross-complaint is both late and permissive. (Memo. 4:9.) Moreover, CRC 3.1324 is not complied with. This case should proceed to trial without further delay.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's tentative ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
